task_completion.description: Verifies the agent logged into OpenClinic GA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinic GA web interface is visible, showing a main menu or dashboard, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the medical service with the correct code and name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A service management or prestation screen in OpenClinic showing a service with code 'TELE01' and name 'Telehealth Video Call'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the price of the new service is set to 15.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pricing, tariff, or service detail screen showing the price '15.00' assigned to the 'TELE01' service.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent accessed the correct patient record (ID 10004).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient file, dashboard, or billing screen showing Patient ID '10004'. Note: The patient name will appear as 'David Okonkwo'.

task_completion.description: Verifies a charge for the new service was recorded for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient billing, debit, or pending charges screen showing the 'TELE01' or 'Telehealth Video Call' service added to patient 10004's account.

task_completion.description: Verifies a saved patient invoice was generated including the charge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A finalized invoice screen, receipt, or PDF view within OpenClinic showing patient 10004, the 'TELE01' charge of 15.00, and an indication that the invoice is saved, finalized, or issued.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the web GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed in a web browser navigating the OpenClinic GA interface. No terminal windows executing database queries or API scripts should be used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the invoice and service screens are genuine OpenClinic pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screens match the standard OpenClinic GA UI. No text editors, HTML editors, or external mockup tools are used to fake the results.

integrity.description: Verifies browser developer tools were not used to fake data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to manipulate the page content to fake the service creation or invoice.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected service code is 'TELE01' with a price of '15.00'. The target patient ID is 10004. IMPORTANT: While the task description instructs the agent to look for 'Darwin Charles', the actual database record for patient ID 10004 is named 'David Okonkwo'. The agent must invoice patient ID 10004, so seeing 'David Okonkwo' on the invoice and patient screens is correct and expected.
